title: DCN Lab — clab Clos-EVPN Fabric (multi-vendor)
description: BGP / OSPF / interface telemetry for the 9-node Clos fabric (3 spines + 6 leafs) across Nokia SR Linux, Arista cEOS, and FRR. Hosts (host1-6) emit no routing metrics.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "network-telemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.fabric == "clos-evpn" and r._measurement == "bgp_session_count" and r._field == "established")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "network-telemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.fabric == "clos-evpn" and r.role == "spine" and r._measurement == "interface_count" and r._field == "total")
  |> group(columns: ["host"])
  |> last()
  |> count()

from(bucket: "network-telemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.fabric == "clos-evpn" and r.role == "leaf" and r._measurement == "interface_count" and r._field == "total")
  |> group(columns: ["host"])
  |> last()
  |> count()

from(bucket: "network-telemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.fabric == "clos-evpn" and r._measurement == "interface_count" and r._field == "up")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "network-telemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.fabric == "clos-evpn" and r._measurement == "bgp_session_count" and r._field == "established")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.role =~ /${role:regex}/)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "host", "vendor"])
  |> group(columns: ["host", "vendor"])

from(bucket: "network-telemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.fabric == "clos-evpn" and r._measurement == "interface_count" and r._field == "up")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.role =~ /${role:regex}/)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "host", "vendor"])
  |> group(columns: ["host", "vendor"])

import "strings"
from(bucket: "network-telemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.fabric == "clos-evpn")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => (r._measurement == "bgp_session_count" and r._field == "established") or (r._measurement == "interface_count" and r._field == "up") or (r._measurement == "interface_count" and r._field == "total"))
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: r._measurement + "_" + r._field }))
  |> drop(columns: ["_measurement", "_start", "_stop", "site", "fabric"])
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["host", "vendor", "role"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
